reviews.review_description: I can't join a server, I also can't put on cosmetics and neither color codes, and the physics are really slow. The movement is clean and the maps are good but I also can't make a name. Also there is no Zero Gravity, no horror and no Rising Lava. If your going to make a fangame add what the trailer says so it won't be clickbait or smthn, other then that's it's a pretty good fangame.
